title: chamaecrista lineata var. clarensis
intro: Chamaecrista lineata var. clarensis, also known as sensitive plant, is a variety of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to South Africa. The medicinal properties of Chamaecrista lineata var. clarensis include its ability to reduce inflammation and act as an antiseptic, which can aid in wound healing. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure and reduce the risk of certain diseases, such as diabetes and heart disease. Chamaecrista lineata var. clarensis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, as well as a tincture, to harness its medicinal properties.
